Flavors are Cream Cheese, Cookie Butter, Maple, Princess Cake & Cookie, Pumpkin Spice and Red Velvet (4 oz. bottle of each flavor)
Bullet Point 2: MORE IMPACT THAN AN EXTRACT: With our stronger variety flavor profile, our emulsion delivers a deeper impact than typical flavor extracts. Achieve that bakery-grade taste in your homemade baked goods.
Bullet Point 3: VERSATILE FLAVORING: Perfect for enhancing flavor for baking in cookies, cakes, and desserts, our Variety emulsion ensures your creations have a punch of flavor that won't bake out.
Bullet Point 4: GLUTEN-FREE & KETO-FRIENDLY: Catering to diverse dietary needs, our gluten-free extract replacement is a preferred choice in gluten-free and keto baking. Flavor without compromise!
Bullet Point 5: SUSTAINABLE PACKAGING: Packaged in BPA-free, recyclable PET plastic bottles. Our bakery emulsion variety pack, made in the USA, promotes both taste and environmental responsibility.

overall_summary: LorAnn’s bakery emulsion variety pack is positioned as a mid-tier, specialty baking product targeting home bakers and small-scale artisans. catalog_content:
Item Name: POSSIBLE Meal Bar - High Protein Energy Bars with 20g of Organic Plant-Based Protein - Vegan, Gluten-Free, Non-Dairy - USDA Organic - Clean Label - 1 Box, 10 Bars - Chocolate Almond Bullet Point 1: About POSSIBLE: POSSIBLE products are backed by Standard Process-an industry leader in whole food based nutritional supplements for over 90 years Bullet Point 2: Clean Label Protein: These meal bars are USDA organic, non-GMO, gluten-free, non-dairy, and vegan; the bars contain no artificial sweeteners, colors, or preservatives Bullet Point 3: Plant-Based Protein Meal Bar: With 20g of plant-based protein per bar, this protein bar aids your energy and sustenance; once you're out there, you can stay out there Bullet Point 4: Vegan Protein: Great source of iron, vitamin E, thiamin, riboflavin, niacin, folate, vitamin B12, biotin, pantothenic acid, phosphorus, magnesium, selenium, copper and manganese Bullet Point 5: On-the-Go Energy Bars: This delicious protein meal bar is great if you don't have time for a meal and need to keep hunger from nipping at your heels during a busy day Bullet Point 6: Healthy & Organic Protein Bars: POSSIBLE products use ingredients grown on Standard Process’s 868-acre certified organic farm Bullet Point 7: Vegan, gluten-free, non-dairy, non-GMO, USDA Organic Product Description: For athletes and adventurers, today's goals become tomorrow's standards with POSSIBLE Meal Bars. This vegan protein bar is designed to keep hunger from nipping at your heels. No matter if you’re navigating a long trail or an even longer day.

Crafted with 20g of plant-based protein, this meal bar is packed with whole food ingredients that support the sustenance and energy you need to keep on keeping on. The nutrient-rich ingredients offer a perfect balance of nutrition and taste. This meal bar is an excellent source of iron, vitamin E, thiamin, riboflavin, niacin, folate, vitamin B12, biotin, pantothenic acid, phosphorus, magnesium, selenium, copper and manganese.

With its clean label and non-GMO, gluten-free ingredients, this organic protein bar is a healthy option for those who lead an active lifestyle. All POSSIBLE products use ingredients grown on Standard Process’s 868-acre certified organic farm. We control every step of our process-from growing and sourcing to processing and packaging-to ensure better nutrient-density and delivery.

POSSIBLE is a line of clean-label, whole food products that were created to supercharge performance. They're made with impeccable ingredients, formulated by nutritional experts, and designed to give you the energy and vitality you need to take on any challenge-from everyday life to ambitious endeavors. This purpose-driven collection of Snack Bars, Meal bars, Plant-Based Proteins, and SuperGreens taste delicious and take a science-based approach to filling nutritional gaps. They also target a spectrum of performance factors to put goals-even world records-within reach.

Our whole food ingredients are backed by the quality, innovation, research, and scientific approach of Standard Process-an industry leader in whole food-based nutritional supplements for over 90 years.

Value: 32.0 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium, science-backed plant-based protein bar positioned for health-conscious consumers, particularly athletes or active lifestyles. High-protein content (20g per bar) and organic, non-GMO, gluten-free, vegan certifications justify a premium price point. Packaging emphasizes clean-label, whole-food integrity with USDA Organic and Clean Label certifications, reinforcing brand credibility and quality. Bulk multipack (10 bars) suggests value for repeat buyers, though individual bar pricing may remain elevated due to specialized ingredients and branding.
